source_meta.source_document: CPT 12/14 Hip System Surgical Technique and Trident II product materials

systems.system_notes: Hybrid total hip arthroplasty construct combining the cemented CPT polished taper stem family with the Trident acetabular system.

trays.tray_notes: The CPT surgical technique describes dedicated femoral preparation instrumentation and Trident materials describe simplified acetabular tray configurations.

components.component_notes: Official Zimmer Biomet materials describe the polished tapered cobalt-chromium CPT stem family with multiple offsets and long-stem options.
The CPT 12/14 taper supports a range of compatible femoral head options.
Official Trident materials describe the acetabular shell family used with the hybrid construct.
Official Trident materials describe X3 polyethylene and related liner options.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The public CPT technique gives stem-family detail but this pass does not expand all stem and head codes within the hybrid construct.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper catalogue or IFU pass is needed for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
